name: Arjun Mehta
client_profile: Second-generation business owner and active HNI equity investor who tracks markets daily and expects the RM to connect global overnight moves to his portfolio before the opening bell.
meeting_context: Quarter-start review call focused on whether to redeploy part of his cash buffer into technology and mid-cap names after recent volatility.
primary_objective: Capture equity upside while preserving flexibility to add on weakness in preferred sectors.
communication_style: Direct, concise, and numerically grounded. Prefers brief market interpretation over generic commentary.
decision_lens: Portfolio performance, sector rotation, and timing of incremental deployment.
key_concerns: US technology spillover into Indian IT
Whether elevated volatility creates a better entry point
How much cash to keep versus redeploy
rm_notes: Prefers concise morning briefs and wants the RM to lead with what US technology, yields, and market tone mean for his IT and financials exposure today.
